message:
fix(store): fix clippy collapsible-if and dead_code warnings

- Collapse nested if in drop_if_expired (should_evict && remove)
- Add #[allow(dead_code)] on internal_entries_insert (added by concurrent
  agent, not yet wired to all call sites)
